title: alchemilla alpina subsp. subsericea
intro: Alchemilla alpina subsp. subsericea is a subspecies of the alpine lady's mantle, a plant species known for its delicate white flowers and velvety leaves. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Alchemilla alpina subsp. subsericea are said to provide health benefits such as reducing swelling and soothing skin irritations, as well as aiding in the treatment of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Alchemilla alpina subsp. subsericea can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to calm digestive issues and support skin health.
